content_body: When one arrives in this special place, the time ahead seems deliciously interminable. Inevitably, of course, it evaporates like the space of a heartbeat..! By all standards we made one mighty fine heartbeat out of our five days of doing as close to nothing as we could possibly manage! Everything was off limits that served any purpose other than immediate and healing pleasure: books and games emerged from suitcases; knitting appeared as did two new art projects; a 1,000 piece jigsaw puzzle, half completed and lovingly transported from our last mountain retreat, took over the dining room table. Interspersed among these pleasures were fires and naps, conversation, (maps), companionable silences, togetherness and solitude and more naps. Oh, and simple meals with excellent libations! The much needed rest and healing came to both, and we return to busy lives refreshed from our peaceful "heartbeat" in Paradise... we left one here for you!! Enjoy.
title: Lives Refreshed in the Paradise of the North GA Mountains
